endpoints.name: Elemental monkey trio (Pansage / Pansear / Panpour line)

description: Third corpus Pansear print joins the elemental-monkey-trio cohort node; cohort now spans 9 prints across 6 canonical species. The FUS-037 print shares verbatim flavor text with DAA-026 (the volcanic-cave-dweller Pokedex window) paired with a compositionally divergent register — comedic-action fruit-foraging mid-leap vs. DAA-026's chiaroscuro cave crouch — a textbook designer-coordinated reprint within consecutive Sword & Shield expansions. Cohort membership predicates on species identity, not set or printing; this is a cohort-thickening extension to an already-complete-at-canonical-species-coverage character node.
